TTf^T?fRR, tWI^+K (*frft) 1AOn c . i n f t l < (\\ -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART.,11—SEC. 3(ii)] f^q^r: Mto ^ P T ftwr ^Ti ^f^r w& ^rr^ft T$* STRI^HI *TTCCT % < M ^ t H W ^ m.^T.f^. 998(3f), cTTft^ 21 ftdsK, 1974 STCT ^ r f § m ^£t *rf *ft 3TTT 3fffo ^ f e f , s r f ^ ^ r r * I W * ^T.STT. 814(3T) c f T ^ 23 *Tn£, 2015 STTT f^TT *RT I MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 11th May, 2015 S.O. 1250(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 and sub-section (6) of section 5 of the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974 (6 of 1974), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, forest and Climate Change number. S.O. 814(E), dated the 23rd March, 2015, namely:— In the said notification,— (i) for serial number 11 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely:— "11. Shri Vivek Narayan Shejwalkar, —Member" mayui Municipal Corporation, Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh (ii) for serial number 14 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely:— "14. Dr. Sukumar Devotta, —Member" Ex-Director, National Environmental Engineering research Institute, Nagpur. [F. No. 15014/21/2009-CPW] Dr. RASHID HASAN, Adviser (CP) Note : The Principal notification constituting the Central Pollution Control Board was published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 998(E) dated the 21st September, 1974 and last reconstituted vide notification number S.O. 814(E ), dated the 23rd March, 2015. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri. New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications. Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
